Class JsonObjectAdapter<T extends Map<K,V>, K, V>

java.lang.Object
iu.client.JsonObjectAdapter<T,K,V>
Type Parameters:
T - target type
K - key type
V - value type
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuJsonAdapter<T>
class JsonObjectAdapter<T extends Map<K,V>, K, V> extends Object implements IuJsonAdapter<T>
Adapts to/from JsonObject values.
